title: KList
content:
# KList


Represents a list of objects of DataModel type.

This class extends the built-in List class and provides additional functionality.

Methods:
    to_df(): Converts the list to a pandas DataFrame.


## Methods


### to_df() -> pd.DataFrame

Convert a list of Pydantic models into a single, wide pandas DataFrame, preserving all fields (strings, bools, lists, numbers, datetimes, etc.), exploding `resource` via parse_resource(), and flattening any dict columns.
summary: Represents a list of objects of DataModel type.

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client()
result = client.base.data_model.to_df()
